data.title: SOL price aiming for $294-$316 by October-end on bullish indicators, current price $228.63 offers entry chance.
data.description: Analysts are predicting that the price of SOL will likely reach between $294 and $316 by the end of October. The current price of SOL stands at $228.63, indicating a promising opportunity for strategic entry into the market. This forecast is supported by bullish MACD signals, suggesting a positive trend in the near future.

data.title: Cardano aims to surpass $0.93 resistance, aiming for $1.18 long-term target. Short-term forecast at $0.81-$0.93 by October 2025.
data.description: According to recent ADA price predictions, there is a potential 9% increase expected in the coming weeks, reaching a resistance level of $0.93. The medium-term forecast for Cardano suggests a range between $0.81 and $0.93 by October 2025.

data.title: XRP price may surge to $3.30-$3.50 in 7-14 days. $2.90 support crucial for bullish trend.
data.description: The analysis of technical indicators suggests a positive XRP price outlook, with short-term targets of $3.30-$3.50. It is crucial for the price to maintain support at $2.90 for the Ripple forecast to come to fruition.

data.title: BNB tests $1,300 resistance amid bullish trend near $1,153, may drop to $900 support by Nov 2025.
data.description: The cryptocurrency BNB is currently trading close to its highest value in the past 52 weeks at $1,153, showing strong upward momentum. There is a short-term target set at $1,300, but there is also a possibility of a correction to a range between $900 and $1,050 if the current resistance levels remain.

data.title: Global engineering plastics market to reach $130.98 billion by 2030, based on report by MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Engineering Plastics Market predicts significant growth with a global forecast extending to 2030. The market, categorized by types such as ABS, Polyamide, Polycarbonate, PET & PBT, Polyacetal, and Fluoropolymer, is expected to see substantial expansion. The report covers various end-use industries and regions, offering valuable insights for stakeholders. This forecast suggests an optimistic outlook for the engineering plastics sector, indicating potential opportunities for growth and development.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $5,200-$5,500 by November 2025, with immediate resistance at $4,670. Technicals support bullish outlook.
data.description: The price of Ethereum (ETH) is expected to reach between $5,200 and $5,500 in the next 4 to 6 weeks based on technical analysis, as key indicators are showing bullish alignment. To sustain this upward trend, it is crucial for the price to surpass the immediate resistance level at $4,670.
"Tariffs aren’t the whole inflation story. Core PCE would still be ~2.7–2.8% YoY without them. The real risk is persistence — inflation could take longer to fade. "

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs boost ‘Uptober’ with $3.2B, marking the second-best week on record. Analysts foresee a breakout ahead.
data.description: Analysts have identified Bitcoin ETFs as a key indicator of market sentiment, suggesting a potential breakout for "Uptober." This insight highlights the significance of these ETFs in signaling market trends.

data.title: BTC expected to reach $135,000 in 4-6 weeks on strong technical momentum, bullish MACD, and RSI at 52-week highs.
data.description: According to recent technical analysis, Bitcoin may experience a significant increase to $135,000 in the next 4-6 weeks. This potential surge is backed by strong bullish MACD momentum and a neutral RSI position close to its 52-week highs.

data.title: Sui Foundation offers advanced replay & debugging tools for developers, enabling transaction reconstruction & issue diagnosis in Web3, boosting reliability.
data.description: The Sui Foundation has introduced new replay and debugging tools, aimed at empowering developers within the Web3 ecosystem. These tools allow for transaction reconstruction and issue diagnosis, which helps enhance reliability for developers. This announcement is set to impact a significant number of developers, revolutionizing their workflow and improving their ability to create reliable applications in the Web3 space.

data.title: EVA Air starts nonstop Dallas-Taipei route on October 3, 2025, featuring new premium economy product.
data.description: EVA Air's latest premium economy offering made its debut in the U.S. with the launch of the Dallas-Fort Worth to Taipei route. The special inaugural ceremony at Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport marked the initiation of this new service. On October 4, 2025, EVA Air commemorated the launch with a ceremony to mark this milestone occasion.

data.title: Noratip Dhanasarnsilp from Bitkub talks about future crypto trends and challenges in risk management, highlighting Chainalysis in compliance. (Characters: 124)
data.description: Noratip Dhanasarnsilp, representing Bitkub, provided valuable information on current blockchain trends and discussed the importance of risk management in the cryptocurrency industry. He emphasized the significant role played by Chainalysis in ensuring compliance within the crypto sector. For further details on this topic, please click the provided link.

data.title: Bitfinex Securities leads in tokenised financial instruments, offering regulated security tokens since 2021. Join us now!
data.description: Since its launch in 2021, Bitfinex Securities has played a key role in advancing tokenised financial instruments and has become a prominent platform for regulated tokenised security offerings. This has solidified its position as a leader in this sector.

data.title: White House cuts funding to Democratic cities and states after government shutdown, impacting billions.
data.description: Billions of dollars in funding to cities and states governed by Democrats have been either reduced or put on hold by the White House following the shutdown of the federal government.

data.title: Low-cost airlines Spirit and Frontier disrupted the industry but now struggle with loss of customers and rising costs. Several face financial challenges.
data.description: Smaller airlines such as Spirit and Frontier have witnessed a decline in customer retention to larger competitors, resulting in an increase in their expenses. These carriers are now facing financial challenges due to these factors.

data.title: Budget bill signed by Trump halts program assisting low-income retirees with healthcare costs; enrollment of 8M Americans affected.
data.description: President Trump signed a budget bill that included a provision halting the initiative to expand enrollment in programs that help low-income elderly individuals with increasing healthcare expenses.

data.title: Private equity firms monitor the ethics of drug research. Some trials overseen by firms linked to drugmakers, posing conflicts.
data.description: Numerous drug trials are evaluated by organizations affiliated with the drug manufacturers, sparking worries regarding conflicts of interest and the safety of patients.

data.title: Examining Stellar (XLM) decentralization: Analyzing myths and facts of blockchain's consensus protocol, emphasizing quality over quantity of validators.
data.description: Discover the misconceptions surrounding the decentralization of blockchain technology and delve into the innovative consensus protocol of Stellar (XLM). Gain a deeper understanding of why an increased number of validators does not always equate to heightened security. Explore this topic further for valuable insights.

data.title: Fujitsu partners with NVIDIA to boost AI adoption, drive industrial transformation with integrated AI agents.
data.description: In an effort to accelerate AI adoption and drive industrial transformation, Fujitsu has announced a deeper collaboration with NVIDIA. The partnership aims to deliver integrated AI agents and high-performance infrastructure. This collaboration comes as part of Fujitsu's strategic efforts to enhance its AI capabilities. The companies will work together to develop full-stack AI solutions, utilizing NVIDIA's expertise in high-performance computing. The collaboration is expected to facilitate the integration of AI technologies in various industries. The announcement was made in Tokyo on October 4, 2025.

data.title: NVIDIA boosts semiconductor anomaly detection with NV-Tesseract and NIM, improving fault identification and cutting production losses.
data.description: NVIDIA has announced the launch of two new products, NV-Tesseract and NIM, aimed at transforming anomaly detection within semiconductor fabs. These innovations are set to bring about a significant advancement in fault identification accuracy, leading to a decrease in production losses. The introduction of NV-Tesseract and NIM showcases NVIDIA's commitment to enhancing efficiency and quality control in the semiconductor industry.
